variants.title: Mann Filter H 837 Hydraulics | Replaces the Donaldson P164203
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements for high-pressure filters offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β1000

variants.title: Donaldson P164203 Hydraulic Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P164203 Hydraulic Cartridge offers superior filtration performance, effectively removing contaminants from hydraulic fluids. Its high-capacity design helps maintain fluid cleanliness and system efficiency. Constructed from durable materials, this hydraulic cartridge is suitable for a wide range of industrial and heavy-duty hydraulic systems.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β1000

variants.title: Fleetguard HF6201 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P164203
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF6201 premium hydraulic cartridge filter is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β1000
